div1.entryFree:
Queasy, 1) inclined to nausea, squeamish, fastidious: in despite of his quick wit and his q. stomach he shall fall in love with Beatrice, Ado II, 1, 399. q. with == disgusted with: q. with his insolence, Ant. III, 6, 20.
2) ticklish, nice: I have one thing of q. question, which I must act, Lr. II, 1, 19.*
